script: One roll, faster masking, and far less cleanup. Try pre-taped masking film on your next project.

scenes.narration: One roll, faster masking, and far less cleanup. Try pre-taped masking film on your next project.
scenes.video_prompt: A friendly European-American professional painter holds one integrated pre-taped masking film roll, looks directly into the camera, points once to the permanently connected yellow masking tape and transparent PE film, and speaks in clear energetic natural American English with accurate lip sync: 'One roll, faster masking, and far less cleanup. Try pre-taped masking film on your next project.' Subtle workshop room tone, no music, one continuous medium close-up, natural confident facial expression and restrained hand movement. The product geometry stays unchanged and the yellow tape never separates from the transparent film.
scenes.negative_prompt: silent person, closed mouth while speaking, mismatched lip movement, extra fingers, deformed product, separated tape and film, subtitles, logo, watermark, camera shake
